hypothesis: Extending ASTRA to simultaneously interpolate score-based diffusion models conditioned on three or more metastable states by solving for interpolation weights that equalize their time-marginal densities will enable direct a priori sampling of intermediate (index-1) and higher-index saddle points in multi-step reaction networks, producing sampled configurations with committor distributions centered near 0.5 and recovering known intermediates at a higher rate than pairwise (two-state) ASTRA.
